name: Golden Minerals Company
description: Golden Minerals Company is a Delaware corporation based in Golden, Colorado, primarily focused on producing gold and silver from its properties in Mexico, as well as acquiring and advancing precious metals properties in Mexico, Nevada, and Argentina. The company's principal properties include the Velardeña Properties in Durango State, Mexico, and the El Quevar project in Salta Province, Argentina. Golden Minerals is committed to growing its resource base and generating shareholder value through exploration, development, and production of precious metals.
